Title: Directs the metropolitan transportation authority and the New York city transit authority to rename the Chambers St 1/2/3 subway station to the Chambers St-Borough of Manhattan Community College station
Summary: Directs the metropolitan transportation authority and the New York city transit authority to rename the Chambers St 1/2/3 subway station to the Chambers St-Borough of Manhattan Community College station.
ActClause: AN ACT directing the metropolitan transportation authority and the New York city transit authority to rename the Chambers St. 1/2/3 subway station to the Chambers St-Borough of Manhattan Community College station; and provides for the repeal of such provisions upon expiration thereof
